title: Formulas for the dimensional characteristics of compression springs

implementation_guidance.reason: This table is formula-driven, so JSON is better than plain CSV for symbolic solving.
implementation_guidance.extra_textbook_note: Text below the table notes an alternative for squared-and-ground ends: Ls = (Nt - a)*d, where a varies with average 0.75.
solver_usage: Combine them with independent problem equations such as L0 = y + Ls when given in examples.
Solve for the unknowns with your algebraic solver.
